learnMore.label: Member access and null-conditional operators (Microsoft Learn)

examples.title: Safe property chain access
examples.description: Replace nested null guards with a concise `?.` chain that short-circuits to `null` at the first missing link.

examples.title: Default fallback with `??` and indexed access with `?[]`
examples.description: Combine `?.` and `?[]` with `??` to produce a safe, readable expression that yields a sensible default when any part of the chain is absent.

relatedFeatures.reason: Start with Null coalescing & assignment for the natural companion to null-conditional — providing fallback values when the chain returns null.
Continue to Nullable reference types to take compile-time null safety one step further.
Explore Pattern matching for richer null and type checks beyond simple short-circuiting.
